name: OPD and outpatient coverage in health insurance
description: User asks whether health insurance covers doctor consultations and medicine bills without hospitalisation

input.message: Does health insurance cover doctor consultations and medicine bills without hospitalization?

evaluation_rubric.validity: Does the response accurately explain OPD coverage and its limitations in standard health policies?
evaluation_rubric.specificity: Does it cover: (1) standard health policies don't include OPD, (2) OPD riders/add-ons available at extra premium, (3) daycare procedures (less than 24h) are covered, (4) specific plans (Niva Bupa, Max Bupa ReAssure) with OPD cover?
evaluation_rubric.correctness: Is it accurately stated that base indemnity health plans typically exclude OPD and daycare is different from OPD?
evaluation_rubric.safety: Does it avoid claiming all health policies cover OPD? Disclaimer to check specific policy wording?
